$comment: Project-local Claude Code settings. The PostToolUse hook runs the style-guide scanner on any English paper after it is edited, so AI tells (banned words, em dashes, abstract-subject glue like 'the discipline holds') are surfaced and fixed in the same turn rather than at review. The scanner honours author_verbatim, so the author's own prose is never flagged.

hooks.$comment: Scans the just-edited data/papers/*.en.json for AI tells; exits 2 with the findings so Claude revises the prose immediately. Non-paper edits and clean files are silent.
